title: Escape from Kalaan
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Battle |prev=[[Massacre on Abridon]]''[[Star Wars: Force Commander]]'' |conc= |next=*[[Mission to Ruul (Galactic Civil War)|Mission to Ruul]] *[[Siege of Jabba's Palace|Mission to Jabba's Palace]]''[[The New Essential Guide to Characters]]'' places Luke Skywalker's mission to Abridon between the end of [[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire|''Shadows of the Empire'']] and the beginning of [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Return of the Jedi'']]. Those events are respectively set in 3.5 ABY and 4 ABY according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''. |image=[[File:Brenn_guarded.jpg]] |name=Escape from Kalaan |conflict=[[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] |date=c.[[3 ABY/Legends|3.5 ABY]]-[[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] |place=[[Kalaan/Legends|Kalaan]] |result=*[[Brenn Tantor]] and [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] freed *Tantor, and a [[Kalaan defectors|stormtrooper unit]] defect to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] |side1=[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] |side2=[[Brenn Tantor]] and associates |side3= |side4= |commanders1=*[[Grand General/Legends|Grand General]] [[Malcor Brashin]] |commanders2=*[[Brenn Tantor]] *[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] |commanders3= |commanders4= |unit1= |unit2= |unit3= |unit4= |forces1=*[[Stormtrooper/Legends|Stormtroopers]] *[[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|AT-ST walkers]] *1 [[Imperial mobile artillery|Mobile artillery]] *[[Turbolaser/Legends|Turbolaser]] turrets |forces2=*10 [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] **[[Wehda Jochi]] **[[Gana Lant]] **[[Otome Mafai]] **[[Graaqu Namec]] **[[Beljo Phtre]] **[[Cancl Rosan]] **[[Javda Tawas]] **[[Spevi Wiwas]] *[[Kalaanite resistance]] guerrillas *[[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|AT-ST walkers]] *[[Tracked Mobile Base|TR-MB]] |forces3= |forces4= |casual1=Moderate |casual2=Light |casual3= |casual4= |civilian= }} {{Quote|Reporting for duty, General. What's the plan?''"
"''The plan is you get me out of here.|[[Gana Lant]] and [[Brenn Tantor]]|}} In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], [[Brenn Tantor]] and [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] were freed by Tantor's [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] [[Kalaan defectors|unit]] in the '''Escape from Kalaan'''. During the course of the [[Massacre on Abridon]], Skywalker was captured by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[General/Legends|general]] Tantor and his forces. Skywalker was sent to [[Kalaan/Legends|Kalaan]], where he was imprisoned while awaiting transfer to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] and the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lords]] who awaited him there. Later in the battle, Tantor refused an order from his superior, [[Grand General/Legends|Grand General]] [[Malcor Brashin]], to raze a [[Abridon refugee camp|refugee camp]]. Tantor was stripped of command and sent to the [[Kalaan prison|prison]] on Kalaan. Once on Kalaan, Tantor was put in an outdoor cell and informed by Brashin that in the morning, he would we tried, found guilty, and executed. Unknown to Brashin, several factors conspired to foil his plans. First, Tantor had contacted the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] on his way to Kalaan and arranged with General [[Tyr Taskeen]] to defect. When Tantor made it there, Taskeen was ready for him. A small base and several takeoff-ready shuttles waited for Tantor only a short distance from the Imperial base. Second, Brashin made the mistake of assigning a unit of [[Kalaan defectors|Tantor's own stormtroopers]] to guard him. The ten [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] were strongly loyal to the commander who had led through battle after battle, and it was not difficult for [[Gana Lant]] to convince his nine comrades to free their general. When Brashin left Tantor's cell, Lant arrived, informing Tantor that his guards were ready to defect. Freed by Lant, Tantor hijacked the [[Tracked Mobile Base]], a heavily armored command crawler. He directed Lant's men to storm the prison, freeing Skywalker. With the combination of his own military skills, the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] hero Skywalker, the prototype TR-MB, and the unit of stormtroopers, Tantor finally felt that he was in a strong enough position to defect. [[File:Kalaanite_rebels.jpg|thumb|left|200px|The [[Kalaanite]] [[Kalaanite resistance|resistance fighters]].]] The group set out down Kalaan's barren valleys, but couldn't leave the prison without triggering the alarm. Alerted, several Imperial patrols joined the turrets that dotted the canyon walls as threats. Nevertheless, Tantor was able to overcome the patrols and capture the turrets with the aid of several native [[Kalaanite]] [[Kalaanite resistance|resistance fighters]] and the [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|AT-ST walkers]] they had captured. After carefully making their way through the valleys, Tantor and Skywalker arrived at Taskeen's base safely. From there, they and their squad were airlifted to Taskeen's fleet, where Skywalker was welcomed back to the Alliance and Tantor was imprisoned until he could prove that he was not an Imperial plant. ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: Force Commander]]'' {{1st}} {{1stID|Escape from Kalaan}} ==Sources== *''[[The New Essential Guide to Characters]]'' *{{CSWECite|I||Abridon}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{GCW 3 ABY 2}} {{Interlang |es=Escape de Kalaan }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Kalaan, Escape from}} [[Category:Battles of Kalaan]] [[Category:Battles of the Galactic Civil War]] [[Category:Rescue missions]]
